items.title: Kuldeep and Rahul help DC sign off with big win
items.summary: RR's victory earlier in the day against MI meant both PBKS and KKR were knocked out from the playoffs race
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: I'm leaving with an incredible sense of peace - Guardiola
items.summary: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola's says that he feels "so much love" for the club in his final post-match interview following their 2-1 defeat at home to Aston Villa.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Jones earns breakthrough French Open win after 'hardest moment of career'
items.summary: Britain's Francesca Jones earns an emotional first Grand Slam match win at the French Open following "the hardest moment" of her career.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
